---
title: The State of WebRTC in 2024
author: TechThinker
date: 2024-02-27
description: WebRTC has matured into a powerhouse for real-time communication
tags: ["#webrtc", "#p2p"]
---
WebRTC has matured into a powerhouse for real-time communication. Browser support is now universal, and the ecosystem of tools around it has exploded.

## Key Trends

- **Insertable Streams** allow custom processing of media
- **WebTransport** is emerging as a complement for data channels
- **SFU architectures** dominate production deployments

The future is peer-to-peer, and WebRTC is leading the charge.
